{"analysis":"The extraction succeeded (with bad CRC). Let me check the extracted file contents and also examine the EOCD record. I need to understand the zip structure better and find the correct password.","plan":"1. Check what was extracted to /tmp/extracted2/app/launchcode.txt
2. Look at the EOCD record bytes
3. Try to reconstruct the zip properly","commands":[{"keystrokes":"cat /tmp/extracted2/app/launchcode.txt 2>/dev/null
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"xxd /tmp/extracted2/app/launchcode.txt 2>/dev/null
","duration":0.1},{"keystrokes":"dd if=/app/varsea/disks/sub1/subA/subAlpha/ae3f4c.dat bs=1 skip=3145829 count=22 2>/dev/null | od -A d -t x1z
","duration":1.0}]}
